A

alreadyProcessed(String) - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.MetadataService
Checks if a file has already been successfully processed or permanently failed.

Handles application configuration loading and folder initialization.

B

Orchestrates the overall CSV-to-JSON batch processing workflow.

Main application class and entry point.

Exception thrown when CSV parsing or validation fails.

Service to parse CSV files into a dynamic List of Maps representing rows.

ensureDirectoryExists(File) - Static method in class com.example.csvjson.util.FileUtils

Represents the metadata associated with a file processed by the application.

Service responsible for scanning the file system directories for CSV files.

Utility functions for file system operations.

H

hasExtension(File, String) - Static method in class com.example.csvjson.util.FileUtils
Checks if a file ends with a specific extension (case-insensitive).

I

incrementRetry(String) - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.MetadataService
Increments the retry count for a file in the metadata.

JSON_EXTENSION - Static variable in class com.example.csvjson.util.Constants

Service to write dynamic data structures (List of Maps) as formatted JSON files.

L

loadMetadata() - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.MetadataService
Reads all metadata records from the CSV file into memory.

logError(String, Throwable) - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.LogService
 
logInfo(String) - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.LogService
 
LogService - Class in com.example.csvjson.service
Manages the application execution log (execution.log) and processing results (results.csv).
LogService(AppConfig) - Constructor for class com.example.csvjson.service.LogService
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.example.csvjson.CsvJsonApplication
 
markFailure(String, int, LocalDateTime) - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.MetadataService
Marks a file as FAILED.
markPermanentFailure(String, int, LocalDateTime) - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.MetadataService
Marks a file as PERMANENT_FAILURE.
markSuccess(String, int, LocalDateTime) - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.MetadataService
Marks a file as SUCCESS.
METADATA_HEADERS - Static variable in class com.example.csvjson.util.Constants
 
MetadataService - Class in com.example.csvjson.service
Manages the processed-files.csv ledger to check file status and update execution states.
MetadataService(AppConfig) - Constructor for class com.example.csvjson.service.MetadataService
 
moveFile(File, File) - Static method in class com.example.csvjson.util.FileUtils
Moves a file to a destination directory, replacing any existing file with the same name.

P

parse(File) - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.CsvParserService
Parses the given CSV file into a List of Maps.
process() - Method in class com.example.csvjson.processor.BatchProcessor
Executes the normal batch processing run.

Represents the processing outcome of an individual file.

R

RESULT_HEADERS - Static variable in class com.example.csvjson.util.Constants
 
retryFailedFiles() - Method in class com.example.csvjson.service.RetryService
Finds and retries processing on all failed CSV files.

Service responsible for retrying failed CSV file conversions.
